content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: benford_deviation_interpretation, journal_entry_threshold_analysis, cash_flow_revenue_variance_mechanics, transaction_cut_off_testing_precision, saas_metric_manipulation_indicators, timeline_causal_mechanism_reconstruction, financial_impact_sensitivity_modeling, analytical_procedure_statistical_rigor, control_deficiency_fraud_triangle_linkage, data_analytics_algorithm_specification, expert_witness_testimony_preparedness, comparative_industry_benchmarking
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
